summary: Festival System v2.0 Complete Testing - Iteration 140. All features verified: Dynamic nominations (max 5 per category), 4-state system (UPCOMING, VOTING, LIVE, ENDED with auto-transitions), voting types (player/ai/algorithm), countdown banners with state badges and voting type badges, improved cards with reward previews, NomineeCard with quality_score rounded to integer, voting functionality with weighted votes and remaining votes display.
critical_code_review_comments: FESTIVALS dict correctly defines 3 festivals: golden_stars (player), spotlight_awards (ai), cinema_excellence (algorithm)
State transitions based on days_until: >3 days = upcoming, 0-3 days = voting, 0 to -6h = live, else ended
can_vote logic correctly checks voting_type == 'player' AND status == 'voting'
Quality scores displayed as integers (Math.round in NomineeCard)
Voting returns weighted vote (peso x1.2) and remaining votes count
Italian translations working: 'IN ARRIVO', 'VOTAZIONI APERTE', 'IN DIRETTA', 'CONCLUSO'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and festival data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Festival System v2.0 fully verified. Key findings: 1) 3 official festivals with different voting types: golden_stars (player), spotlight_awards (ai), cinema_excellence (algorithm). 2) 4-state system working: UPCOMING (>3 days), VOTING (0-3 days), LIVE (0 to -6h), ENDED. 3) Voting only allowed for player festivals in voting status. 4) Countdown format: 'Xg HH:MM:SS'. 5) Quality scores rounded to integers. 6) Weighted voting based on player level/fame. 7) All tabs working: Festival, Player, Classifica, Premi, Storico. 8) Italian translations verified.

can_vote_logic.rule: can_vote = true only when voting_type=player AND status=voting

history_tab.message: Nessuna cerimonia conclusa ancora (no past editions yet)
